productDisplayName: Fastrack Men Non Leather Brown Belts
description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing - be it to secure a bottom, or act as a styling detail to tops and trousers. This synthetic leather belt from fastrack is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire.Length: Freesize Made of synthetic leather for durability and style Metal loops on fixed buckle for added attraction Metal loops and studs behind the loop and after the holes for increasing the smartness quotient Tang clasp to offer a snug Fit and hold the belt in place Holes to customise fit Movable loop for a customized fit Brand name embossed on tail CareUse a brass polisher to maintain buckle shineWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
